page.title: Let's find the right care for you.
page.subtitle: Three quick questions — about 30 seconds. We use your answers to surface the nurses and packages most relevant to your situation.
page.secured: Your answers stay private. We use them to filter our nurse list; nothing is shared.

recipient.label: Who needs care?
recipient.help: Choose whoever the visit is for.

situation.label: What's going on?
situation.help: Pick the closest match — you can refine once you see nurses.

actions.talkToCoordinator: Not sure? Talk to a Care+ coordinator
actions.browseAllNurses: Or skip this — browse all nurses

result.title: Here's who can help
result.summaryGeneric: Based on your answers, here are the right caregivers and packages for you.
result.urgentBadge: Marked as urgent — we're prioritising nurses available today.

coordinator.title: Talk to a Care+ coordinator
coordinator.body: Tell us what's going on and we'll suggest the right nurse or package. We respond within working hours.
coordinator.fallbackChannelHint: We'll get back to you within a few hours.
